artPrompt: A locked frosted-glass office door looming in extreme foreshortened close-up, its blank smudged paper sign curling at one taped corner, an illegible taped clock face beside it casting a hard cyan glow. Beyond the rippled glass, towering filing-cabinet silhouettes vanish into humming fluorescent murk, while a faint arcane shimmer leaks under the threshold across a cold ivory floor, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Closed for Inventory
text:
During each opponent's turn, the first time they would roll a die or flip a coin, instead a sign goes up reading "BACK IN 5 MINUTES" and that roll or flip doesn't happen. (It is never 5 minutes.)
At the beginning of your upkeep, you may turn the sign around to read "OPEN" to draw a card, then it flips back.
flavorText: The clock taped to the door has read 5 minutes from now for as long as anyone can remember.

extras.parasitic: denies opponents' first roll/flip each turn
